While AI and drones are increasingly used for visual inspections and predictive maintenance, the physical act of repairing blades and components remains a human-centric task that is difficult to automate in the near term.

title: AIエンジニア
exposure_rationale: AI Engineers are at the epicenter of the technology, meaning their core tasks—coding, data analysis, and model architecture—are highly susceptible to being performed or optimized by the very AI tools they build. While they remain essential for high-level system design and ethical oversight, the automation of routine coding and data cleaning significantly increases their productivity, potentially reducing the total headcount needed for standard implementation tasks.

title: CG制作
exposure_rationale: CG production is a purely digital field where Generative AI is already capable of automating core tasks like 2D asset creation, texture generation, and even complex 3D modeling and animation. While high-level creative direction and complex scene integration still require human oversight, the productivity gains from AI are drastically reducing the labor hours required for routine production steps.

title: DXプロデューサー
exposure_rationale: As a role centered on digital transformation, DX Producers heavily utilize AI for data analysis, solution architecting, and content generation, significantly increasing their individual productivity. While the core of the job requires high-level human judgment, stakeholder negotiation, and creative visioning that AI cannot yet replace, the 'work product' is fundamentally digital and information-based, making the role highly exposed to AI-driven restructuring.

title: ITコンサルタント
exposure_rationale: IT consulting is a knowledge-intensive digital profession where AI can automate core tasks like data analysis, system architecture drafting, and report generation. While high-level strategic alignment and stakeholder management still require human judgment and trust, AI-driven productivity gains will significantly reduce the manual effort required for research and technical documentation.

title: M&Aマネージャー、M&Aコンサルタント/M&Aアドバイザー
exposure_rationale: M&A work is highly digital and information-intensive, involving extensive data analysis, due diligence, and document preparation where AI can provide massive productivity gains. While the core of the job requires high-stakes human negotiation, trust-building, and complex judgment that AI cannot yet replace, the 'knowledge work' components that currently take up the majority of a consultant's time are highly susceptible to automation.

title: UX/UIデザイナー
exposure_rationale: UX/UI design is a digital-first occupation where AI tools can now generate wireframes, layouts, and even functional code from text prompts or sketches. While high-level user empathy and stakeholder management remain human-centric, the technical production of assets and iterative testing are being rapidly automated, significantly increasing individual productivity and reducing the total labor hours required per project.

title: Webディレクター（Web制作会社）
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a Web Director—planning, wireframing, content creation, and progress management—are increasingly automated or augmented by generative AI and advanced project management tools. While human-to-human communication and client negotiation remain essential, AI significantly reduces the labor required for technical oversight and asset production, leading to major restructuring in how web production teams are staffed and managed in Japan.

title: Webデザイナー（Web制作会社）
exposure_rationale: Web design is a fundamentally digital occupation where core tasks—layout creation, image editing, and coding (HTML/CSS)—are being rapidly automated by Generative AI and no-code tools. While high-level creative direction and client management remain human-centric, the technical production work that defines the bulk of the role in Japanese production companies is highly susceptible to AI-driven restructuring.

title: あんまマッサージ指圧師
exposure_rationale: This occupation requires highly specialized physical manipulation and real-time tactile feedback that current AI and robotics cannot replicate in a clinical or home-visit setting. While AI may assist with administrative tasks like scheduling or patient history analysis, the core service is a hands-on physical therapy protected by national licensing and human-to-human interaction.

title: はり師・きゅう師
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of an acupuncturist (Harishi/Kyushi) are highly physical and tactile, requiring the manual identification of pressure points and the precise insertion of needles. While AI can assist with administrative tasks or diagnostic suggestions based on Eastern medicine patterns, the actual treatment requires real-time human interaction and physical dexterity that is difficult to automate in a clinical setting.

title: アウトドアインストラクター
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical activity in unpredictable natural environments and real-time human interaction, which are highly resistant to AI automation. While AI can assist with administrative tasks, route planning, or environmental data analysis, the primary value lies in physical safety supervision, hands-on instruction, and human hospitality.

title: アナウンサー
exposure_rationale: AI voice synthesis and digital avatars can already perform routine news reading and narration with high accuracy, significantly impacting entry-level tasks. While high-stakes live sports commentary and complex interpersonal interviewing remain difficult to automate, the core information-delivery aspect of the job is highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains and replacement.

title: アートディレクター
exposure_rationale: The core work product is digital, and generative AI is revolutionizing visual asset creation, layout design, and concept ideation. While the role still requires high-level human judgment for brand alignment and client management, AI significantly automates the production tasks of the designers and illustrators they manage, leading to massive productivity gains and team restructuring.

title: イラストレーター
exposure_rationale: The work product is entirely digital and generative AI has reached a level where it can produce high-quality illustrations, character designs, and backgrounds in seconds. While top-tier creative direction and unique brand consistency still require humans, the vast majority of routine commercial illustration, gaming assets, and advertising visuals are being fundamentally restructured by AI tools.

title: インダストリアルデザイナー
exposure_rationale: Industrial design is a digital-heavy knowledge profession where AI can now rapidly generate 2D sketches, 3D models, and color variations based on specific parameters. While human judgment is still required for physical ergonomics, manufacturing feasibility, and cross-departmental coordination, AI significantly reduces the time needed for the core creative and drafting phases.

title: インテリアコーディネーター
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of visual design, 3D modeling, and material selection are highly susceptible to Generative AI, which can instantly produce high-quality interior renderings based on client preferences. While the role requires physical site visits and high-level interpersonal consulting to navigate Japan's complex housing regulations and client emotions, AI will significantly automate the production of design proposals and technical documentation.

title: インテリアデザイナー
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of interior design—generating layouts, selecting color palettes, and creating 3D visualizations—are increasingly being automated or enhanced by generative AI and CAD integration. While the role still requires physical site visits, client relationship management, and coordination with contractors, the digital production side of the work is highly exposed to significant productivity gains and restructuring.

title: エコノミスト
exposure_rationale: Economists perform high-level knowledge work that is almost entirely digital, involving data analysis, trend forecasting, and report writing—all areas where LLMs and AI-driven statistical tools excel. While top-tier strategic synthesis and policy advocacy still require human judgment and credibility, AI can now automate the vast majority of data collection, econometric modeling, and initial drafting, significantly reducing the number of workers needed for these tasks.

title: オーケストラ奏者（団員）
exposure_rationale: The core of the job is a live, physical performance in a specific acoustic environment, which AI cannot replicate in a way that satisfies the cultural demand for human artistry. While AI may assist in peripheral tasks like score study, digital sheet music management, or practice analysis, the professional value lies in the real-time human-to-human synchronization and emotional expression directed by a conductor.

title: カウンセラー（医療福祉分野）
exposure_rationale: AI is highly effective at text-based sentiment analysis, therapeutic chatbots, and automating clinical documentation, which are core parts of this role. However, the high-stakes nature of medical/welfare counseling in Japan, combined with the legal requirements for certified professionals (Licensed Psychologists) and the cultural emphasis on human-to-human 'rapport' (trust), creates a significant barrier to full automation.

title: カラーコーディネーター
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of color coordination—analyzing trends, mapping color palettes to brand concepts, and generating visual simulations—are highly digital and align perfectly with generative AI capabilities. While high-end consulting and physical material matching still require human judgment, AI can now automate the vast majority of research, mood board creation, and personal color analysis.

title: キャリアカウンセラー/キャリアコンサルタント
グラフィックデザイナー
exposure_rationale: Graphic design is a digital-first occupation where Generative AI can now perform core tasks like image creation, layout generation, and color theory application with high speed. While high-level art direction and client management still require human judgment, the technical production work that defines the entry-level and mid-tier of this profession in Japan is facing massive restructuring and productivity shifts.

title: ゲームクリエーター
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of game creation—coding, graphic design, sound production, and scenario writing—are all digital-first domains where generative AI is achieving massive productivity gains. While high-level creative direction and project management remain human-centric, the labor-intensive production of assets and code is undergoing significant restructuring and automation.

title: コピーライター
exposure_rationale: Copywriting is a purely digital information-processing task where AI models already excel at generating creative catchphrases, structured text, and persuasive content based on specific data. While high-level creative direction and final client management still require human judgment, the core production of drafts and variations is being rapidly automated, significantly reducing the time and manpower needed per project.

title: システムエンジニア（Webサービス開発）
exposure_rationale: Web service development is almost entirely digital, with core tasks like coding, debugging, and documentation already being revolutionized by LLMs and AI coding assistants. While high-level requirements definition and team collaboration remain human-centric, AI significantly reduces the time required for technical implementation, leading to major productivity gains and structural shifts in how these roles are staffed.

title: システムエンジニア（受託開発）
exposure_rationale: The core work products—code, design documents, and test plans—are entirely digital and highly susceptible to AI generation and automated debugging. While high-level requirements gathering and client communication provide a buffer, AI significantly accelerates the technical execution, leading to major productivity gains and restructuring of the traditional SE-to-programmer hierarchy in Japan.

title: システムエンジニア（基盤システム）
exposure_rationale: Infrastructure engineering has shifted from physical hardware manipulation to 'Infrastructure as Code' (IaC), making the work product almost entirely digital and highly susceptible to AI automation. AI can now generate complex configuration scripts, optimize network architectures, and troubleshoot system logs, though human oversight remains necessary for high-level security requirements and complex client negotiations.

title: システムエンジニア（組込み、IoT）
exposure_rationale: While core tasks like coding, system design, and data analysis are highly susceptible to AI automation, this role requires significant integration with physical hardware, sensors, and real-world environments. The need for on-site testing, hardware-software co-design, and managing physical constraints (like memory and power) provides a buffer compared to purely digital software engineering.

title: ジュエリーデザイナー
exposure_rationale: Jewelry design is increasingly digital, relying heavily on CAD software and visual conceptualization, areas where generative AI can now produce high-quality 3D models and intricate patterns instantly. While high-end bespoke work still requires human brand identity and material expertise, the core tasks of trend analysis, sketching, and technical drafting are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and productivity gains.

title: スクールカウンセラー
exposure_rationale: While AI can assist with documentation, preliminary psychological screening, and providing resource materials, the core of the role involves high-stakes interpersonal trust, physical presence in schools, and complex emotional navigation. Cultural expectations in Japan regarding 'kokoro no kea' (emotional care) and the need for multi-party coordination between teachers, parents, and students create significant barriers to AI replacement.

title: スタイリスト
exposure_rationale: While AI can assist with trend analysis, mood board creation, and virtual outfit simulations, the core of the job involves significant physical labor, such as transporting heavy garments, on-site adjustments under studio lighting, and manual tasks like ironing. Furthermore, the role requires high-level interpersonal negotiation with apparel brands and real-time collaboration with directors on physical sets, which limits full automation.

title: スポーツインストラクター
exposure_rationale: While AI and computer vision can provide real-time form correction and personalized workout plans, the core of the job requires physical presence, safety supervision, and high-touch interpersonal motivation. In Japan's aging society, the role often includes a social and caregiving component that is difficult to automate with current technology.

title: セキュリティエキスパート（オペレーション）
exposure_rationale: This role is fundamentally digital, centered on monitoring logs and analyzing data, which are tasks where AI and machine learning are already being integrated to detect anomalies faster than humans. While high-level incident response and client communication still require human judgment, the core operational tasks of surveillance and initial analysis are highly susceptible to automation, especially as Japan faces a severe shortage of cybersecurity talent.

title: セキュリティエキスパート（デジタルフォレンジック）
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of digital forensics—data extraction, log analysis, pattern recognition, and malware reverse engineering—are highly digital and increasingly automated by AI and machine learning. While human experts are still required for legal testimony, chain-of-custody physical handling, and high-level ethical judgment, AI can process vast amounts of forensic data significantly faster than humans, fundamentally reshaping the productivity and workflow of the role.

title: セキュリティエキスパート（情報セキュリティ監査）
exposure_rationale: Information security auditing is a digital-centric knowledge profession where AI can automate the analysis of vast technical logs, document reviews, and vulnerability assessments. While high-level human judgment, ethical accountability, and stakeholder interviews remain essential, AI tools will significantly increase auditor productivity and automate routine compliance checking against established standards like ISO/IEC 27001.

title: ソフトウェア開発（パッケージソフト）

title: デバッグ作業
exposure_rationale: Debugging is a purely digital information-processing task that is being revolutionized by AI's ability to analyze code, generate test cases, and suggest fixes. Japan's strict privacy laws and the need for legally admissible physical evidence ensure that human presence and judgment remain central to the profession.

title: 放送ディレクター
exposure_rationale: While the role requires high-level human leadership and on-site coordination of staff and talent, the core creative outputs—scripting, storyboarding, and video/audio editing—are becoming heavily augmented by generative AI. In Japan's labor-short media industry, AI will increasingly automate routine editing and content generation tasks, allowing fewer directors to manage more complex productions.

title: 放送記者
exposure_rationale: Broadcast journalism involves high-level digital tasks like scriptwriting, video editing, and information synthesis, all of which are being heavily augmented by generative AI. While physical presence for on-site reporting and human-to-human interviewing remains essential, AI will significantly automate background research, draft generation, and the technical production of news segments, leading to higher productivity and potential workforce consolidation.

title: 整形外科医
exposure_rationale: Orthopedic surgery involves a high degree of physical intervention, manual dexterity, and real-time tactile feedback during surgeries that AI cannot currently replicate. However, AI is significantly impacting the diagnostic phase through automated medical imaging analysis (X-rays, MRI) and surgical planning, while Japan's aging population will likely drive the adoption of AI-assisted robotic surgery and administrative automation to manage high patient volumes.

title: 新聞記者
exposure_rationale: The core output of a journalist—writing and structuring articles—is highly susceptible to AI automation, and AI tools can now rapidly synthesize press releases and data into news stories. While physical presence for interviews and investigative 'boots-on-the-ground' reporting remain essential human elements, the industry is under intense pressure to use AI for productivity gains due to the decline of print media in Japan.

title: 日本語教師
exposure_rationale: Japanese language teachers face high exposure as AI excels at core tasks like lesson planning, grammar explanation, and automated essay grading. While the interpersonal aspect of classroom management and cultural integration remains human-centric, AI-driven personalized learning and real-time translation tools will significantly restructure how language is taught and practiced in Japan.

title: 映像編集者
exposure_rationale: Video editing is a fundamentally digital occupation where AI is rapidly automating core tasks such as color grading, object removal, and rough-cut generation. While high-level creative direction and storytelling still require human judgment, the technical barriers to entry are collapsing, and productivity gains from AI mean fewer editors can handle much larger volumes of content.

title: 林業技術者
exposure_rationale: While core tasks involve physical field surveys and on-site supervision in unpredictable natural environments, AI and drones are significantly transforming the data collection, forest inventory analysis, and management planning aspects of the role. Japan's labor shortage is accelerating the adoption of smart forestry technologies, but the need for human judgment in ecological conservation and interpersonal coordination with forest owners remains high.

title: 柔道整復師
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical manipulation (manual therapy), palpation, and applying bandages or casts, which require tactile precision and human presence. While AI can assist in diagnosis through image analysis and automate administrative tasks like insurance billing (recept-com), the physical and interpersonal nature of the treatment remains highly resistant to automation.

title: 栄養士
exposure_rationale: Core digital tasks like meal planning, nutritional calculation, and inventory management are highly susceptible to AI automation. However, the role remains 'High' rather than 'Very High' because it requires physical presence in kitchens/facilities, real-time interpersonal counseling, and coordination with medical staff in unpredictable clinical environments.

title: 植物工場の研究開発
exposure_rationale: This role is heavily focused on data-driven optimization of environmental variables (light, CO2, nutrients) and genetic analysis, tasks where AI excels at pattern recognition and predictive modeling. While physical 'hands-on' verification in the factory remains necessary, the core R&D process is increasingly digital, shifting the researcher's role toward managing AI-driven simulations and automated monitoring systems.

title: 植物工場の設計、施工
exposure_rationale: The design phase is highly digital and susceptible to AI-driven CAD optimization, environmental simulation, and cost-efficiency modeling. However, the role also involves physical construction management, site inspection, and hands-on coordination with contractors, which provides a buffer against full automation.

title: 検察事務官
exposure_rationale: The role involves extensive document preparation, evidence analysis, and administrative processing that are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and productivity gains. While tasks like victim support and interrogation attendance require human presence and empathy, the core functions of case management, legal research, and digital forensics are increasingly being reshaped by AI tools.

title: 検察官
exposure_rationale: Prosecutors deal with vast amounts of digital and written evidence, where AI can significantly accelerate document review, case law research, and evidence synthesis. However, the core responsibilities—interrogating suspects, making discretionary decisions on whether to prosecute (indictment), and performing in-court litigation—require high-level human judgment, ethical considerations, and interpersonal intuition that are resistant to full automation.

title: 検疫官（看護師）
exposure_rationale: The role combines physical tasks like visual inspections, vaccinations, and pest collection with significant administrative and information-processing duties. While AI can automate document screening, translation, and real-time infection data analysis, the core requirement for physical presence in ports and human-to-human clinical judgment limits full automation.

title: 機械設計技術者
exposure_rationale: Mechanical design is heavily digital, relying on CAD, CAE, and simulation tools that are increasingly integrated with AI for generative design and automated optimization. While physical prototyping and cross-functional communication remain essential, AI significantly accelerates the core tasks of drafting, material selection, and feasibility analysis, leading to high productivity gains and a shift toward supervisory roles.

title: 歯科助手
exposure_rationale: The administrative and clerical components (reception, billing, and scheduling) are highly susceptible to AI automation and self-service systems. However, the core clinical assistance tasks—such as physical instrument preparation, sterilization, and real-time chairside support—require physical presence and manual dexterity that AI cannot currently replicate in a clinical setting.

title: 歯科医師
exposure_rationale: Dentistry requires high-precision manual dexterity and physical intervention in a complex, unpredictable biological environment, which remains difficult to automate. However, AI is significantly impacting the profession through advanced diagnostic imaging (AI-driven X-ray/CT analysis), treatment planning for orthodontics, and administrative tasks, making it a mix of physical and high-tech knowledge work.

title: 歯科技工士
exposure_rationale: The profession is undergoing a massive digital transformation as traditional manual molding is replaced by CAD/CAM systems and 3D printing. While the final product is physical, the core work of designing prosthetics is increasingly digital, allowing AI to automate complex design tasks and optimize structural integrity based on 3D scans.

title: 歯科衛生士
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a dental hygienist involve highly precise manual procedures in the human mouth and real-time interpersonal health guidance, which are resistant to AI automation. While AI will enhance diagnostic imaging and administrative scheduling, the physical nature of cleaning teeth and assisting in surgery ensures the role remains fundamentally human-centric in the Japanese healthcare context.

title: 気象予報士
exposure_rationale: The core task of analyzing meteorological data and generating forecasts is highly digital and increasingly dominated by AI and machine learning models that outperform traditional statistical methods. While legal requirements in Japan mandate a qualified human professional for official forecasting, the role is shifting toward high-level consulting and media communication, as the technical prediction work is largely automated.

title: 水産技術者
exposure_rationale: This role involves a significant amount of data analysis, environmental modeling, and research documentation which are highly susceptible to AI optimization. However, the core of the job requires physical field surveys, hands-on biological experiments, and direct technical guidance to fishermen, creating a natural barrier to full automation.

title: 治験コーディネーター
exposure_rationale: The role involves significant administrative and data-driven tasks, such as creating case reports and scheduling, which are highly susceptible to AI automation and streamlining. However, the core of the job requires high-level interpersonal coordination between doctors, patients, and pharmaceutical companies, as well as empathetic patient support, which provides a buffer against full replacement in Japan's strictly regulated medical environment.

title: 法務技官（心理）（矯正心理専門職）
exposure_rationale: The role involves significant digital-friendly tasks such as psychological assessment, report writing (鑑別結果通知書), and data analysis, which are highly susceptible to AI assistance. However, the core functions require high-stakes human interaction, clinical empathy, and physical presence within correctional facilities, creating a strong barrier to full automation.

title: 法務教官
exposure_rationale: The core of this role involves high-stakes human interaction, behavioral observation, and emotional guidance within a physical correctional facility, which are difficult to automate. While AI can significantly assist in drafting reports, analyzing behavioral data, and providing educational materials (textbook instruction), the legal responsibility and the need for physical presence in a 24-hour security environment act as strong barriers to high exposure.

title: 測量士
exposure_rationale: Surveying is seeing a significant shift as AI-driven drones, satellite data, and automated CAD processing replace manual calculations and traditional field measurements. While physical presence at construction sites and the legal responsibility of a licensed professional remain necessary, the core tasks of data collection, analysis, and map generation are becoming highly automated, drastically increasing individual productivity.

title: 特別支援学校教員、特別支援学級教員
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly assist with administrative tasks, drafting individualized education plans (IEPs), and creating customized digital learning materials, the core of the job involves physical assistance, emotional support, and real-time behavioral management. The high degree of physical presence required for students with disabilities and the necessity for complex human-to-human empathy create a strong barrier to AI replacement.

title: 特許審査官
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a patent examiner—prior art searching, analyzing technical documents, and comparing legal claims—are fundamentally digital and information-heavy, making them highly susceptible to AI automation. While final legal accountability and complex human-to-human negotiations remain, AI can already perform high-speed cross-lingual searches and draft rejection notices, significantly increasing individual productivity and reducing the total workforce needed.

title: 犬訓練士
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical interaction with animals in unpredictable environments and manual labor such as feeding and health management. While AI might assist in peripheral tasks like scheduling or analyzing dog behavior patterns via video, the fundamental training and physical handling of the animals cannot be automated.

title: 独立系ファイナンシャル・アドバイザー（IFA）
exposure_rationale: IFA work is heavily data-driven, involving financial analysis, portfolio optimization, and market monitoring—tasks where AI excels and can automate significant portions of the technical workload. While the high-touch 'human-to-human' consulting and trust-building aspects provide a buffer, AI-driven robo-advisors and automated planning tools will increasingly handle the core analytical and administrative functions, significantly raising the productivity bar for human advisors.

title: 獣医師
exposure_rationale: AI will significantly enhance diagnostic accuracy through image analysis (X-rays, CT scans) and data-driven treatment planning, particularly in biomedical research and public health monitoring. However, the core of the job remains highly physical and interpersonal, requiring manual surgery, physical examinations of unpredictable animals, and empathetic communication with pet owners or farmers.

title: 理学療法士（PT）
exposure_rationale: Physical therapy is primarily a hands-on, physical occupation requiring real-time manual manipulation and human-to-human interaction in unpredictable clinical environments. While AI will significantly assist in diagnosis, personalized program generation, and progress tracking, the core tasks of physical assistance and emotional encouragement remain resistant to automation in Japan's aging society.

title: 生産・品質管理技術者
exposure_rationale: This role is heavily focused on data-driven decision-making, such as production planning, inventory optimization, and quality analysis, which are highly susceptible to AI and machine learning algorithms. While it requires cross-departmental coordination and physical site inspections, the core tasks of scheduling and troubleshooting are increasingly automated through AI-integrated ERP and smart factory systems in Japan's advanced manufacturing sector.

title: 産婦人科医
exposure_rationale: AI will significantly impact diagnostic tasks, such as analyzing fetal ultrasounds and identifying gynecological tumors, while also automating administrative documentation. However, the core of the role involves physical surgical procedures, emergency obstetric interventions, and high-stakes interpersonal communication, which remain difficult to automate in Japan's current regulatory and cultural landscape.

title: 産業医
exposure_rationale: AI can significantly assist in analyzing health checkup data, identifying high-risk employees, and ensuring regulatory compliance, which are core parts of the role. However, the job requires high-level human mediation between management and employees, physical workplace inspections (職場巡視), and nuanced mental health counseling that relies on trust and professional judgment.

title: 産業廃棄物処理技術者
exposure_rationale: This role combines digital knowledge work, such as chemical analysis, regulatory compliance, and process planning, with physical site inspections and hands-on laboratory testing. While AI can significantly optimize waste processing algorithms and automate data analysis for recycling efficiency, the requirement for physical presence in unpredictable industrial environments and the high stakes of handling hazardous materials provide a buffer against full automation.

title: 産業用ロボットの設置・設定
exposure_rationale: While the physical installation and wiring of robots require manual presence, the core tasks of system design, programming, and simulation are increasingly automated by AI-driven 'no-code' tools and digital twins. In Japan's labor-short market, AI is being aggressively integrated into the SIer workflow to speed up robot deployment, shifting the human role toward high-level system architecture and client communication.

title: 産業用ロボット開発技術者
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of this role—software coding, CAD design, and data analysis—are highly digital and increasingly automated by AI tools. While the job requires physical testing and hardware integration, AI is becoming a primary driver in robot perception, path planning, and simulation, fundamentally reshaping how these engineers develop and optimize systems.

title: 畜産技術者
exposure_rationale: This role involves a mix of high-level data analysis (genetics, breeding, and environmental monitoring) and essential physical presence for animal care and field inspections. While AI can significantly optimize feed formulations, disease prediction, and breeding strategies, the requirement for hands-on technical guidance and physical intervention in unpredictable farm environments limits full automation.

title: 看護助手
exposure_rationale: The core tasks involve physical labor and direct patient care, such as bathing, feeding, and transferring patients, which are difficult to automate in unpredictable hospital environments. While AI can streamline peripheral administrative tasks like inventory management and documentation, the high demand for human-to-human assistance in Japan's aging society ensures the role remains fundamentally manual.

title: 看護師
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly assist with diagnostic support, patient monitoring, and administrative documentation, the core of nursing involves physical procedures, emergency response, and complex interpersonal care. In Japan's aging society, the human-to-human 'care' aspect and physical presence in unpredictable clinical environments remain essential and difficult to automate.

title: 知的財産コーディネーター
exposure_rationale: This role is primarily digital and knowledge-based, involving patent searches, document analysis, and legal strategy, all of which are being heavily augmented by LLMs and specialized AI search tools. While it requires high-level human coordination between researchers and lawyers, AI can now automate the core tasks of drafting summaries, identifying prior art, and organizing application data, significantly increasing individual productivity and reducing the total headcount needed for routine coordination.

title: 知的財産サーチャー
exposure_rationale: This occupation is fundamentally digital, revolving around the collection, analysis, and synthesis of vast amounts of text-based data (patents and technical literature). Large Language Models (LLMs) are exceptionally proficient at semantic searching, summarizing complex technical documents, and identifying prior art, which directly automates the core value proposition of an IP searcher.

title: 社会保険労務士
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a Sharoushi—preparing complex legal documents, filing social insurance applications, and calculating payroll—are highly digital and rule-based, making them prime targets for AI automation and API integration with government systems. While high-level labor consulting and dispute resolution require human judgment, the vast majority of routine administrative work is being rapidly subsumed by HR-tech and AI-driven legal tools.

title: 社会学研究者
exposure_rationale: Sociologists rely heavily on data analysis, literature reviews, and report writing, all of which are being significantly enhanced by LLMs and automated statistical tools. While AI can automate quantitative processing and initial qualitative coding, the core tasks of identifying novel social problems, conducting sensitive human interviews, and providing ethical/theoretical interpretations maintain a need for human expertise.

title: 社会教育主事
exposure_rationale: This role involves significant knowledge work such as curriculum planning, administrative reporting, and data analysis, which are highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains. However, the core of the job requires high-level community coordination, interpersonal negotiation, and physical presence at local facilities, creating a buffer against full automation.

title: 科学捜査研究所鑑定技術職員
exposure_rationale: This role relies heavily on complex data analysis, image/voice processing, and pattern recognition (DNA, handwriting, ballistics), all of which are being revolutionized by AI. While physical lab work and legal accountability remain human-centric, AI will significantly automate the interpretation of evidence and the generation of technical reports, drastically increasing productivity per specialist.

title: 税理士
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of tax preparation, document creation, and routine accounting are highly digital and data-driven, making them prime targets for AI automation. While high-level tax strategy, legal representation, and complex business consulting still require human judgment and trust, the vast majority of the traditional workload is being rapidly subsumed by AI-integrated accounting software and automated filing systems.

title: 精密機器技術者
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of conceptual design, CAD modeling, and simulation (CAE) are increasingly being automated or enhanced by generative AI and advanced optimization algorithms. While physical prototyping and cross-departmental coordination provide a buffer, the shift toward digital twins and AI-driven quality control significantly reduces the manual cognitive load for engineers in this field.

title: 精神科医
exposure_rationale: Psychiatry involves a high degree of digital-adjacent work such as diagnosis, medical record keeping, and pharmaceutical management, where AI can significantly assist in pattern recognition and treatment planning. However, the core of the profession relies on nuanced human-to-human interaction, legal authority for involuntary commitment, and the management of complex social/family dynamics that are resistant to full automation.

title: 細胞検査士
exposure_rationale: The core task of a cytotechnologist—screening slides for abnormal cells—is a high-stakes pattern recognition task that is increasingly being automated by AI-driven digital pathology and computer-aided detection (CAD) systems. While physical sample preparation and final medical accountability remain, the shift toward digital imaging allows AI to perform the primary screening and triage of specimens with high accuracy, significantly reducing the manual labor required per case.

title: 経営コンサルタント
exposure_rationale: Management consulting involves heavy data analysis, report generation, and strategic modeling, all of which are being significantly automated or enhanced by generative AI. While high-level stakeholder management and physical site visits remain human-centric, the core 'deliverables' (decks, research, and financial analysis) are highly digital and susceptible to massive productivity gains or displacement.

title: 義肢装具士
exposure_rationale: While AI and 3D scanning/printing are revolutionizing the design and modeling phases (CAD/CAM), the core of the job requires physical interaction with patients, manual adjustments to fit devices to unique human anatomy, and clinical collaboration. The high degree of physical customization and the medical responsibility of the national license provide a significant buffer against full automation.

title: 翻訳者
exposure_rationale: Translation is a fundamentally digital task that has been profoundly disrupted by Large Language Models (LLMs), which now handle both literal translation and nuanced stylistic adjustments. While high-level literary translation and complex legal/technical 'post-editing' still require human oversight, the vast majority of industrial translation (the bulk of the Japanese market) is being automated or significantly compressed in terms of billable hours.

title: 耐震診断
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical on-site inspections of crawl spaces, attics, and structural joints, which are difficult to automate in unpredictable residential environments. However, the subsequent data analysis, structural modeling, and report generation are highly digital tasks where AI and specialized software already play a significant role and will continue to increase productivity.

title: 職業訓練指導員
exposure_rationale: Vocational instructors face high exposure because AI can automate curriculum development, lecture preparation, and the teaching of theoretical knowledge. However, the role remains anchored by the need for physical safety supervision during hands-on technical training (e.g., welding, mechanics) and the high-touch nature of career counseling and life guidance for trainees in Japan's labor market.

title: 臨床工学技士
exposure_rationale: Clinical Engineering Technologists perform a mix of physical equipment maintenance and real-time monitoring of life-support systems, which requires physical presence in hospitals. While AI will significantly enhance diagnostic monitoring, predictive maintenance of devices, and automated adjustments of settings (e.g., dialysis or ventilators), the high-stakes nature of life-support and the need for manual troubleshooting in clinical environments provide a buffer against full automation.

title: 臨床検査技師
exposure_rationale: AI and computer vision are highly effective at automating the analysis of digital samples (pathology, blood smears) and interpreting physiological data like ECGs and ultrasounds. While the physical collection of samples and direct patient interaction provide a buffer, the core analytical and diagnostic reporting tasks are increasingly susceptible to AI-driven efficiency gains and automation.

title: 自動車技術者
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of automotive engineers—designing via 3D-CAD, simulation, data analysis, and project management—are highly digital and increasingly enhanced by AI-driven generative design and automated testing. While the role requires physical oversight of production lines and prototype testing, Japan's push for CASE (Connected, Autonomous, Shared, Electric) technologies means these engineers will increasingly focus on software-centric development where AI productivity gains are most significant.

title: 自動車教習指導員
exposure_rationale: While the job requires physical presence and real-time intervention, AI and autonomous driving technologies are increasingly automating the core tasks of monitoring student errors and providing feedback. Japan is already seeing the introduction of 'AI instructors' for closed-course training, and as Level 4 autonomous vehicles proliferate, the fundamental need for human-led driving instruction will undergo significant restructuring.

title: 自動運転開発エンジニア（自動車）
exposure_rationale: This is a high-level software and knowledge-based role where AI is both the primary tool and the core product being developed. While it requires physical testing and hardware integration, the shift toward computer-based simulation and AI-driven 'perception, judgment, and control' means that LLMs and generative AI can significantly automate code generation, data labeling, and safety documentation.

title: 舞台照明スタッフ
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly automate the creative planning (lighting plots) and digital control of lighting consoles, the role remains heavily physical. The job requires manual installation of heavy equipment, wiring, and real-time physical adjustments in unpredictable live environments, which are difficult to automate with current robotics.

title: 舞台美術スタッフ
exposure_rationale: Generative AI significantly impacts the design phase, allowing for rapid creation of concept art, 3D models, and costume sketches based on scripts. However, the role remains high-touch, requiring physical presence for on-site construction, material selection, and real-time collaboration with directors and performers in a physical theater environment.

title: 航空管制官
exposure_rationale: Air traffic control is a high-stakes information processing role involving radar data, weather analysis, and complex spatial coordination, all of which are highly susceptible to AI optimization and automated decision-support systems. While Japan's strict safety regulations and the need for human accountability in emergency scenarios prevent full automation, AI will increasingly handle routine traffic flow and conflict detection, significantly augmenting productivity and reshaping the controller's role into one of high-level supervision.

title: 船員
exposure_rationale: While the core work involves physical labor and manual maintenance in unpredictable maritime environments, AI and autonomous navigation systems are increasingly automating route optimization, engine monitoring, and collision avoidance. Japan's severe labor shortage in the shipping industry is accelerating the adoption of these technologies, reducing the required crew size and shifting the role toward system supervision.

title: 英会話教師
exposure_rationale: The core product—language instruction and conversation practice—is increasingly digitized through AI tutors and LLMs that offer 24/7 personalized feedback. While human teachers in Japan still provide essential motivation and cultural nuance for children and business professionals, AI significantly automates lesson planning, grading, and routine speaking drills.

title: 薬学研究者
exposure_rationale: AI is fundamentally transforming drug discovery through generative design, molecular simulation, and genomic data analysis, significantly reducing the time required for the 'search' phase. While physical lab experiments and clinical oversight remain necessary, the core cognitive tasks of a pharmaceutical researcher are increasingly mediated by AI-driven predictive models and big data analytics.

title: 行政書士
exposure_rationale: The core of an Administrative Scrivener's work involves drafting legal documents and navigating complex regulations, tasks that are highly susceptible to Large Language Models and automated filing systems. While complex consulting and physical site visits provide some protection, the Japanese government's push for 'Digital Agency' initiatives and electronic filing significantly reduces the traditional barrier of bureaucratic paperwork.

title: 衛生管理者
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant amount of physical presence for workplace inspections (職場巡視) and interpersonal communication for mental health support and labor consultations, which are resistant to AI. However, the administrative aspects—such as analyzing health checkup data, monitoring environmental metrics, and preparing reports for health committees—are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and predictive analytics.

title: 裁判官
exposure_rationale: Judges perform high-level knowledge work involving massive amounts of digital documentation, evidence analysis, and legal research, all of which are highly susceptible to AI-driven efficiency gains. While the final ethical judgment and the 'human element' in courtrooms remain protected by constitutional and social barriers, AI will significantly automate the drafting of rulings and the synthesis of complex case law.

title: 視能訓練士

Japan's aging population ensures steady demand, but the job remains anchored in a clinical, physical environment that limits full automation.

title: 言語聴覚士
exposure_rationale: AI can significantly assist in speech analysis, automated diagnostic testing, and generating personalized rehabilitation plans, which increases productivity. However, the core of the job involves physical intervention (swallowing/eating therapy) and high-level emotional intelligence to motivate patients, tasks that remain difficult to automate in Japan's healthcare regulatory environment.

title: 診療放射線技師
exposure_rationale: AI is rapidly advancing in medical image analysis (CT, MRI, X-ray), significantly automating the diagnostic support and quality control aspects of the role. While the physical positioning of patients and the operation of complex hardware still require human presence, AI-driven productivity gains in image processing and preliminary screening will likely reduce the total labor hours required per patient.

title: 証券アナリスト
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of data collection, financial modeling, and report generation are highly digital and increasingly automated by LLMs and specialized AI tools. While high-level strategic judgment and direct corporate interviews provide a human moat, the vast majority of the analytical workload is susceptible to significant AI-driven restructuring and productivity gains.

title: 調教師
exposure_rationale: The core of a horse trainer's role involves physical interaction with animals, sensory observation of their condition, and hands-on management of stable staff, which are difficult to automate. While AI can significantly optimize training schedules, diet plans, and race selection through data analysis of performance metrics, the final judgment and the physical nature of the work environment act as strong barriers to high exposure.

title: 調香師
exposure_rationale: AI and machine learning models are already highly effective at predicting scent profiles and chemical formulations based on vast datasets of molecular structures and consumer preferences. While the final physical evaluation and 'artistic' approval still require human senses, the core task of creating prescriptions (formulations) from thousands of ingredients is increasingly being optimized and automated by AI tools.

title: 農業技術者
exposure_rationale: This role involves significant knowledge work such as data analysis, policy planning, and technical research, which are highly susceptible to AI optimization. While field inspections and interpersonal consulting with farmers provide a physical and social buffer, AI-driven precision agriculture and automated reporting will fundamentally restructure how these technicians monitor crops and manage resources.

title: 通訳者

While high-stakes diplomatic or legal interpretation still requires human nuance, the vast majority of business, ad-hoc, and routine interpretation is being rapidly automated or replaced by AI-assisted tools, significantly reducing the demand for human professionals.

title: 通関士

title: 速記者、音声反訳者

title: 造船技術者（船舶の開発・設計）
exposure_rationale: Shipbuilding engineers perform high-level knowledge work—including structural analysis, fluid dynamics (CFD), and 3D-CAD modeling—that is fundamentally digital and data-driven. While the job requires human judgment for client negotiations and physical oversight during sea trials, AI is rapidly automating routine design optimization, simulation, and the generation of production data, significantly increasing individual productivity.

title: 運用・管理（IT）

title: 鉄道車両の設計・開発

title: 陶磁器技術者

title: 雑誌編集者
