While human judgment remains essential for high-level creative direction and relationship management with advertisers and talent, the rapid shift toward digital media in Japan and the automation of routine editorial workflows significantly increase exposure.

title: 雑誌記者
exposure_rationale: Magazine journalism is a digital-first knowledge profession where AI can already perform research, draft articles, and analyze data, significantly increasing productivity. While high-level investigative reporting and exclusive human interviews still require physical presence and trust-building, the core tasks of writing, editing, and content adaptation for digital platforms are highly exposed to AI automation.

title: 電子機器技術者
exposure_rationale: This role involves significant knowledge work including circuit design, software programming, and data analysis, all of which are being heavily augmented by AI-powered CAD tools and automated testing. While physical prototyping and factory-floor troubleshooting provide a buffer against total automation, the core engineering tasks are increasingly digital and subject to massive productivity gains through AI.

title: 電気技術者
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant amount of physical labor, such as on-site inspections, climbing ladders, and manual repairs in unpredictable environments like tunnels or power stations. While AI will significantly enhance the knowledge-based aspects—such as predictive maintenance, analyzing sensor data for fault detection, and optimizing power distribution—the core requirement for human presence and physical intervention remains high.

title: 電気通信技術者
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant amount of digital knowledge work, such as network design, demand forecasting, and capacity planning, which are highly susceptible to AI-driven optimization and automation. However, the core job also requires physical site management, coordination with construction crews, and emergency disaster recovery, which provide a buffer against full AI replacement.

title: 非鉄金属製錬技術者
exposure_rationale: This role combines high-level engineering, data analysis, and process optimization, which are highly susceptible to AI-driven simulation and predictive maintenance tools. While physical presence at the refinery and human management of site workers provide a buffer, the core tasks of production planning, quality control, and R&D are increasingly being transformed by AI in Japan's advanced manufacturing sector.

title: 音楽教室講師
exposure_rationale: While AI can assist with music theory, composition, and providing automated feedback on performance accuracy, the core of the job involves physical demonstration, tactile correction, and emotional mentorship. In Japan's context, the role often functions as a form of 'human-to-human' enrichment and childcare, creating a cultural barrier to full automation despite the digital nature of music data.

title: 高分子化学技術者
exposure_rationale: This role is heavily impacted by 'Materials Informatics,' where AI accelerates the discovery of new polymers by predicting molecular properties and simulating chemical reactions, significantly reducing manual trial-and-error. While physical laboratory experimentation and manufacturing oversight remain necessary, the core cognitive tasks of molecular design, data analysis, and reporting are highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains.

title: 高等学校教員
exposure_rationale: High school teachers face significant exposure as AI can automate lesson planning, grading, and personalized tutoring for specialized subjects. While the human elements of mentorship, club activities, and emotional support remain essential, Japan's labor shortage and the digital nature of curriculum delivery will likely lead to AI-driven restructuring of the teaching workload.

title: 麻酔科医
exposure_rationale: Anesthesiology involves high-stakes real-time monitoring and pharmacological adjustments that are increasingly data-driven and susceptible to AI-assisted precision dosing and predictive analytics. However, the role requires significant physical dexterity for procedures like intubation and epidurals, as well as critical human judgment and communication in high-pressure surgical environments, limiting full automation.

title: CDショップ店員
exposure_rationale: While the physical tasks of stocking shelves and managing in-store events remain, the core knowledge-based tasks—inventory forecasting, music curation, writing promotional copy (POP), and SNS marketing—are highly susceptible to AI automation. Furthermore, the industry faces extreme indirect exposure as AI-driven streaming services continue to replace the fundamental need for physical media retail.

title: OA機器営業
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of analyzing client needs, proposing solutions, and creating sales materials are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and optimization. While physical site visits and relationship management remain important in the Japanese business context, AI will significantly reduce the headcount needed by automating lead generation, technical proposal drafting, and routine customer support.

title: せり人
exposure_rationale: The core task of matching buyers and sellers through price discovery is increasingly being digitized via electronic bidding systems and AI-driven demand forecasting. While the physical presence in the market and relationships with producers remain important, the 'auctioneer' function itself is highly susceptible to automation and algorithmic efficiency gains.

title: カフェ店員
exposure_rationale: The core tasks involve physical food preparation, cleaning, and face-to-face hospitality, which are difficult to automate fully in a social cafe setting. While AI and automation are streamlining ordering (self-kiosks) and inventory management, the physical presence required for manual service and maintaining the shop environment limits overall exposure.

title: ガソリンスタンド・スタッフ
exposure_rationale: The core tasks are physical and site-dependent, including vehicle maneuvering, manual refueling, and mechanical inspections. While AI can optimize inventory and automate payment/surveillance in self-service stations, the physical labor and safety monitoring required by Japanese law (Hazardous Materials Engineer presence) limit full AI replacement.

title: コンサルティング営業（IT）
exposure_rationale: This role involves high-level knowledge work, including proposal writing, market analysis, and technical solution design, all of which are being significantly augmented by generative AI. While the core of the job relies on high-stakes human relationships and trust-building in the Japanese business context, AI will drastically reduce the time required for research, documentation, and technical translation between clients and engineers.

title: コンビニエンスストア店員
exposure_rationale: AI and automation are significantly impacting core tasks like inventory forecasting, automated ordering, and self-checkout systems, which are already prevalent in Japan. However, the role still requires substantial physical labor (stocking shelves, cleaning, food prep) and human-to-human interaction for troubleshooting and customer service, creating a floor for human involvement despite Japan's labor shortage pressures.

title: シューフィッター
exposure_rationale: While AI and 3D scanning can automate precise foot measurement and initial shoe matching, the core of the job involves physical palpation, manual adjustment of insoles (packing work), and high-touch interpersonal consultation. Japan's aging population increases the demand for this specialized health-oriented service, which requires a level of physical dexterity and empathetic communication that AI cannot yet fully replicate.

title: スポーツ用品販売
exposure_rationale: AI can significantly automate inventory management, demand forecasting, and personalized marketing (CRM), which are core to this role. However, the job remains grounded in physical retail, requiring manual tasks like shelf stocking, equipment maintenance/repair, and high-touch interpersonal sales that involve physical fitting and immediate human advice.

title: スーパーレジ係
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of scanning items and processing payments are already being heavily automated through self-checkout and RFID technology in Japan. While human staff remain for customer service and troubleshooting, Japan's severe labor shortage is aggressively driving the transition toward fully autonomous or AI-monitored checkout systems.

title: スーパー店員
exposure_rationale: The core tasks involve physical labor such as stocking shelves, handling fresh produce, and navigating a dynamic retail environment, which are difficult to automate fully. While AI significantly improves inventory management, automated ordering, and self-checkout systems, the need for human presence for physical maintenance and customer assistance remains high in the Japanese context.

title: ディーラー
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a dealer—analyzing market data, predicting price movements, and executing trades—are fundamentally digital and data-driven, making them highly susceptible to AI and algorithmic automation. High-frequency trading and AI-driven predictive models are already replacing human intuition in this field, shifting the role from active manual trading to overseeing complex automated systems.

title: デパート店員
exposure_rationale: While AI can automate peripheral tasks like inventory management, data entry, and multilingual customer support via tablets, the core of the Japanese department store experience (omotenashi) relies on high-touch human interaction and physical presence. Japan's aging population and labor shortages will drive AI adoption for back-end efficiency, but cultural expectations for personalized, face-to-face service in luxury retail provide a significant buffer against full automation.

title: フラワーショップ店員
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical tasks like handling delicate perishables, manual floral arrangement, and unpredictable customer interaction in a physical retail space. While AI can optimize inventory management, pricing, and provide design inspiration, the physical labor and sensory judgment required for 'mizuage' (water treatment) and custom bouquet creation remain difficult to automate.

title: ベーカリーショップ店員
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical tasks such as slicing bread, cleaning, restocking shelves, and handling unpredictable customer interactions in a physical retail space. While AI and automation are streamlining checkout (e.g., image-recognition registers like BakeryScan) and inventory management, the requirement for manual dexterity and real-time human service limits total exposure.

title: ペットショップ店員
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical animal care, cleaning, and feeding, which are difficult to automate in a non-standardized environment. While AI can assist with inventory management, sales data analysis, and providing basic pet care advice to customers, the requirement for physical presence and hands-on interaction with live animals remains a significant barrier to high exposure.

title: ホームセンター店員
exposure_rationale: While inventory management, ordering, and basic product inquiries can be automated via AI and robotics, the core job requires significant physical labor such as stocking heavy DIY materials and providing hands-on advice for complex home improvement projects. Japan's labor shortage is driving AI adoption in retail logistics, but the diverse, tactile nature of hardware store products provides a buffer against full automation.

title: メガネ販売
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly assist in frame selection (virtual try-on) and precision vision measurement, the core of the job involves physical fitting (adjusting frames to the ears and nose) and manual repair, which are difficult to automate. Japan's 'Certified Eyewear Professional' status emphasizes high-touch expertise and medical-adjacent consultation that maintains a need for human presence despite increasing automation in lens processing.

title: リサイクルショップ店員
exposure_rationale: AI significantly impacts the core task of appraisal (査定) by using image recognition and market data analysis to determine prices, reducing the need for specialized human expertise. However, the job remains moderately exposed because it still requires significant physical labor—such as cleaning, repairing, and moving heavy goods—as well as face-to-face negotiation and customer service in a physical retail environment.

title: 代理店営業（保険会社）
exposure_rationale: This role involves high volumes of information processing, such as explaining complex regulations and analyzing market data, which AI can automate or enhance significantly. While the relationship-building and 'solicitor' aspects require human trust and interpersonal skills, the core tasks of product training, sales strategy analysis, and administrative support are highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains in Japan's digitalizing insurance sector.

title: 住宅・不動産営業
exposure_rationale: While the core of the job involves high-touch human interaction and physical site visits, AI is rapidly automating the information-heavy aspects like property matching, market analysis, and legal/tax consultations. In Japan's shrinking market, AI-driven lead generation and virtual tours will significantly increase individual productivity, reducing the total number of sales agents required.

title: 保険営業（生命保険、損害保険）
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of analyzing risk, calculating premiums, and matching products to customer data are highly susceptible to AI optimization and automation. While the 'Gise' (relationship-based) sales culture in Japan provides a buffer, the rise of AI-driven online consultation and automated underwriting is significantly reducing the need for a large human sales force for routine products.

title: 化粧品訪問販売
exposure_rationale: While AI can automate skin analysis, product recommendations, and sales planning, the core of this job relies on physical door-to-door visits and building deep interpersonal trust, especially among Japan's elderly population. The role is shifting toward a 'human-centric' service that counters the trend of digital e-commerce, though AI tools will increasingly assist in the consultation and administrative aspects.

title: 化粧品販売/美容部員
exposure_rationale: While AI and AR can handle skin analysis and virtual makeup simulation, the core of the job involves physical application of products and high-touch interpersonal counseling. In Japan's luxury retail culture, the physical presence and hospitality (omotenashi) of a beauty advisor remain central, though AI will increasingly automate the diagnostic and inventory management aspects.

title: 医薬品販売/登録販売者
exposure_rationale: The core knowledge component—advising customers on drug interactions and side effects—is highly susceptible to AI-driven decision support and automated kiosks. However, the role remains a 'moderate exposure' because it requires significant physical labor (stocking shelves, managing inventory, store cleaning) and face-to-face communication in a retail environment, which are resistant to full automation in the near term.

title: 医薬情報担当者（MR）
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of an MR—synthesizing medical data, providing drug information, and analyzing safety reports—are increasingly handled by AI-driven digital platforms and virtual assistants. While human relationship-building remains important, the shift toward digital detailing and Japan's strict pharmaceutical regulations favor AI's ability to provide instant, accurate, and compliant information, significantly reducing the need for a large human workforce.

title: 印刷営業
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of planning layouts, generating quotes, and managing production schedules are highly susceptible to AI automation and digital workflow integration. While the role requires human-to-human negotiation and physical product handling, the shift toward digital media and AI-driven design tools significantly reduces the manual coordination and creative labor traditionally provided by the salesperson.

title: 商社営業
exposure_rationale: Trading company sales (Shosha Eigyo) involve heavy information processing, market analysis, and logistics coordination, all of which are highly susceptible to AI optimization and automation. While the high-level relationship management and strategic investment components require human judgment, the core tasks of market research, credit checks, and trade documentation are increasingly handled by AI, significantly increasing individual productivity and reducing the need for large teams.

title: 広告営業
exposure_rationale: Advertising sales involves heavy digital information processing, including market analysis, proposal creation, and performance reporting, all of which are being rapidly automated by AI. While the role requires high-level human negotiation and relationship management (especially in Japan's 'trust-based' business culture), AI tools significantly reduce the headcount needed for the planning and administrative phases of the sales cycle.

title: 携帯電話販売
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of explaining complex data plans, processing contracts, and troubleshooting software issues are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and self-service digital portals. While physical presence and interpersonal skills remain necessary for elderly support and hardware handling, the shift toward online sales and AI chatbots for customer service is significantly reducing the need for human staff in physical stores.

title: 書店員
exposure_rationale: While physical tasks like shelving and inventory management remain, AI significantly impacts core knowledge tasks such as demand forecasting, automated ordering, and personalized curation. Generative AI can also automate the creation of promotional POP displays and marketing content, while Japan's labor shortage is accelerating the adoption of self-checkout and automated inventory systems.

title: 空港グランドスタッフ
exposure_rationale: Core administrative tasks like ticketing, passport verification, and baggage check-in are increasingly automated via kiosks and AI-driven facial recognition. However, the role remains moderately exposed rather than highly exposed because it requires significant physical presence for passenger boarding assistance, handling irregular operations (delays/cancellations), and providing high-touch hospitality for elderly or disabled travelers.

title: 自動車営業
exposure_rationale: While the job requires physical presence for test drives and vehicle delivery, much of the core work—product explanation, financing calculations, insurance processing, and lead management—is highly susceptible to AI automation. In Japan, the shift toward digital showrooms and AI-driven CRM tools for predicting replacement cycles will significantly reduce the number of human sales staff needed per dealership.

title: 自転車販売
exposure_rationale: The core of this job involves physical assembly, manual repairs, and hands-on safety inspections that cannot be automated by AI. While AI can assist with inventory management, sales recommendations, and insurance processing, the essential value lies in physical craftsmanship and real-time human interaction within a local community.

title: 衣料品販売
exposure_rationale: While core tasks involve physical presence, tactile product handling, and real-time interpersonal styling advice, AI is significantly impacting peripheral tasks like inventory management, trend forecasting, and personalized marketing (SNS/DM). The rise of AI-driven virtual fitting and automated checkout systems reduces the need for human staff in routine sales, though high-end 'fashion advising' remains a human-centric service.

title: 証券外務員
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of market analysis, financial modeling, and asset allocation are highly susceptible to AI automation, and many customers are shifting to digital-first platforms. While high-net-worth individuals still value human-to-human trust and relationship management, the vast majority of the information-processing and advisory work is being reshaped by sophisticated algorithms and generative AI.

title: 銀行・信用金庫渉外担当
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of financial analysis, loan documentation, and market research are highly susceptible to AI automation, significantly increasing productivity per worker. While the 'face-to-face' relationship management and trust-building aspects provide a buffer, AI-driven tools for credit scoring and personalized financial planning will likely lead to major restructuring and a reduction in the total workforce needed for routine outreach.

title: 電器店店員
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant physical component, including product installation, repairs, and in-person customer service, which provides a buffer against full automation. However, AI will heavily impact the knowledge-based aspects of the job, such as product recommendations, inventory management, and marketing (flyer creation), while Japan's labor shortage will likely push for more automated checkout and AI-driven customer kiosks in large retail stores.

title: 食品営業（食品メーカー）
exposure_rationale: While the core of the job involves physical presence for product sampling, shelf stocking, and relationship building, the analytical components—market trend analysis, sales data presentation, and proposal writing—are highly susceptible to AI automation. AI will significantly enhance the productivity of sales reps by automating data-driven insights and personalized marketing collateral, though Japan's emphasis on face-to-face 'route sales' and physical retail coordination provides a buffer against full automation.

title: 駅構内売店店員
exposure_rationale: While inventory management and sales tracking are increasingly automated by AI and digital systems, the core job requires physical presence for restocking, handling physical returns, and managing a small physical space. In Japan, the shift toward unmanned kiosks and smart vending machines is accelerating due to labor shortages, but the specific role of a human clerk still centers on physical tasks that AI cannot yet perform autonomously.

title: 入国警備官
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly assist in information gathering, document analysis, and real-time translation during investigations, the core of the job involves physical enforcement, arrests, facility security, and the escorting of individuals. These physical and high-stakes interpersonal tasks, combined with the legal authority required for 'compulsory investigations,' provide a strong buffer against full automation.

title: 冷凍加工食品製造
exposure_rationale: The core tasks involve manual physical labor such as peeling, deboning, and sorting raw ingredients, which are difficult to automate fully with AI alone. While AI can optimize production scheduling and quality control via computer vision, the physical nature of the work in wet, unpredictable environments provides a significant barrier to total AI replacement.

title: 刑務官
exposure_rationale: The core of the role involves physical security, manual surveillance, and high-stakes interpersonal counseling for rehabilitation, which are resistant to AI replacement. While AI can assist with administrative paperwork, monitoring logs, and risk assessment analytics, the legal and ethical requirement for human authority and physical intervention in a correctional environment keeps exposure low.

title: 救急救命士
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical emergency medical procedures and real-time decision-making in unpredictable, high-stress environments that require human presence. While AI will significantly enhance diagnostic support, automated reporting, and real-time coordination with hospitals, the physical nature of life-saving interventions and patient transport limits the potential for full automation.

title: 施設警備員
exposure_rationale: While AI-powered surveillance, facial recognition, and autonomous patrol robots are increasingly automating monitoring and detection tasks, the role still requires physical presence for emergency response, manual inspections, and human-to-human interaction. Japan's severe labor shortage in this sector accelerates AI adoption for 'mechanical security,' but legal requirements and the need for physical intervention in unpredictable situations maintain a human core.

title: 水族館飼育員
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical labor in unpredictable environments, such as cleaning tanks, preparing food, and providing direct care to aquatic animals. While AI can significantly enhance water quality monitoring, disease detection through computer vision, and automated feeding schedules, the physical dexterity and human presence required for maintenance and animal interaction remain difficult to automate.

title: 海上保安官
exposure_rationale: While AI will significantly enhance maritime surveillance, data analysis for 'Oceanographic Information,' and autonomous navigation systems, the core of the job involves physical law enforcement, search and rescue, and emergency response in unpredictable marine environments. These high-stakes, hands-on tasks require human presence and physical intervention that cannot be fully automated in the near future.

title: 消防官
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of firefighting and life rescue require physical presence, high-stakes manual dexterity, and real-time navigation of unpredictable, hazardous environments that current AI and robotics cannot handle autonomously. While AI will improve peripheral functions like emergency dispatch optimization, fire spread modeling, and administrative reporting, the fundamental nature of the job remains deeply physical and human-centric.

title: 潜水士
exposure_rationale: Divers perform manual labor in highly unpredictable, high-pressure underwater environments that require physical dexterity and real-time human judgment. While ROVs (Remotely Operated Vehicles) and AI-driven sensors can assist with inspection and monitoring, the core tasks of construction, welding, and rescue remain heavily dependent on human physical presence and specialized manual skills.

title: 税関職員
exposure_rationale: Customs work involves a high volume of digital data processing for import/export declarations and risk assessment, which is highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and predictive analytics. However, the role retains a significant physical component involving manual inspections, canine handling, and real-time human interaction at borders that provides a buffer against total displacement.

title: 自然保護官（レンジャー）
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant amount of physical field work, such as patrolling national parks, wildlife management, and manual maintenance (e.g., clearing brush), which AI cannot perform. However, AI will substantially enhance the knowledge-work components, including environmental data analysis, satellite/drone monitoring of ecosystems, and the administrative tasks associated with government policy and planning.

title: 航空自衛官
exposure_rationale: The role is a hybrid of high-exposure digital tasks (radar monitoring, weapon systems control, and flight data analysis) and low-exposure physical tasks (aircraft maintenance, disaster rescue, and manual logistics). While AI will significantly automate surveillance and tactical decision-support systems, the physical presence required for maintenance, rescue operations, and human-in-the-loop combat decisions maintains a moderate level of human necessity.

title: 警察官（都道府県警察）
exposure_rationale: While AI significantly enhances investigative capabilities through facial recognition, predictive policing, and automated document processing, the core of the job remains physical and interpersonal. Tasks such as making arrests, patrolling physical locations, responding to emergencies, and managing human conflict require a physical presence and real-time judgment that AI cannot replace.

title: 道路パトロール隊員
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical intervention, such as removing road debris and managing traffic at accident scenes, which AI cannot perform. While AI and smart sensors will automate road monitoring and report writing, the requirement for real-time human response in unpredictable outdoor environments keeps exposure low.

title: 陸上自衛官
exposure_rationale: The core of the role involves physical combat, disaster relief, and manual maintenance in unpredictable environments, which are highly resistant to AI. However, exposure is moderate because modern warfare and logistics increasingly rely on AI for intelligence, surveillance, and autonomous systems, and Japan's labor shortage is driving the SDF to integrate AI into administrative and communication functions.

title: 雑踏・交通誘導警備員
exposure_rationale: The core of the job requires physical presence in unpredictable outdoor environments and real-time human interaction, which are difficult for AI to replace. While AI-driven traffic signals, drones, and wearable cameras are increasing productivity and reducing the number of personnel needed per site, the legal requirement for human oversight and the need to assist vulnerable pedestrians (elderly, wheelchair users) maintain a baseline demand for human workers.

title: 麻薬取締官
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant amount of physical fieldwork, including arrests, onsite inspections of medical facilities, and evidence collection, which are resistant to AI. However, AI will heavily impact the investigative and analytical components, such as cyber-investigation, drug identification (spectroscopy analysis), and cross-referencing international intelligence databases.

title: きもの着付指導員
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical, hands-on instruction and the tactile manipulation of fabric on a human body, which AI cannot replicate. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like historical research, curriculum design, and marketing, the essential value lies in real-time interpersonal coaching and the preservation of cultural etiquette.

title: すし職人
exposure_rationale: While AI and robotics can automate routine tasks like rice shaping in mass-market conveyor belt sushi, the core of a traditional sushi chef involves sensory-based fish selection at markets, intricate manual preparation, and real-time interpersonal hospitality. The physical dexterity required for high-end preparation and the cultural value placed on human craftsmanship in Japanese dining provide a strong buffer against full AI replacement.

title: そば・うどん調理人
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical food preparation, manual dexterity for noodle making, and real-time sensory judgment in a kitchen environment. While AI can optimize inventory management and chain-store automation is increasing, the high-end craft (te-uchi) and the interpersonal service aspect in small shops provide a strong buffer against full AI replacement.

title: アロマセラピスト
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical touch, manual treatment techniques, and real-time sensory assessment of a client's physical and emotional state, which are difficult for AI to replicate. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like oil blending recommendations, scheduling, and customer consultation scripts, the high-touch nature and hospitality requirements of the Japanese service industry provide a strong barrier to automation.

title: エステティシャン
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical, hands-on treatment and delicate manual manipulation of the human body, which is difficult to automate. While AI can assist in skin analysis, personalized product recommendations, and administrative scheduling, the essential human-to-human interaction and 'hospitality' (omotenashi) aspects remain central to the profession's value in Japan.

title: キャディ
exposure_rationale: While AI and GPS technology can automate core information tasks like distance measuring and club selection advice, the job remains heavily physical and interpersonal. The role involves physical labor, safety monitoring, and hospitality in an unpredictable outdoor environment, though the rise of 'self-play' technology and automated carts reduces the overall demand for human caddies.

title: クリーニング師
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical handling of garments, manual stain identification, and precision pressing/ironing, which are difficult to automate fully with current AI. While AI can optimize logistics and chemical selection, the legal requirement for a human supervisor and the physical nature of the work in a non-digital environment provide significant protection from displacement.

title: ソムリエ
exposure_rationale: While AI can excel at data-driven wine pairing recommendations and inventory management, the core of the profession involves physical service, sensory tasting, and high-touch hospitality. In Japan's fine dining culture, the human element of storytelling and real-time social interaction remains a critical component that is resistant to automation.

title: ツアーコンダクター
exposure_rationale: AI significantly automates the desk-work components such as itinerary planning, research, and post-trip reporting, while real-time translation tools reduce the language barrier for overseas tours. However, the core of the job remains physical presence, group leadership, and crisis management (handling injuries or delays), which require human empathy and physical intervention in unpredictable environments.

title: トリマー
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a pet groomer are highly physical, requiring manual dexterity and the ability to handle unpredictable, live animals in a 3D environment. While AI may assist with business management, scheduling, or health monitoring diagnostics, the actual washing, clipping, and styling of pets remain extremely difficult to automate with current robotics.

title: ネイリスト
exposure_rationale: While AI-powered nail printing machines and automated painting robots are emerging, the core of the job involves delicate physical manipulation, cuticle care, and customized 3D art that requires high manual dexterity. Additionally, the role serves a significant emotional and hospitality function ('healing and stress relief') in the Japanese service sector, which remains difficult to automate.

title: バーテンダー
exposure_rationale: While automated cocktail machines and AI inventory management can assist with technical tasks, the core of the profession relies on physical dexterity and high-touch interpersonal communication (hospitality). In Japan's bar culture, the bartender's role as a conversationalist and the 'master' of the space provides a significant human-centric barrier to AI replacement.

title: ビデオレンタル店店員
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of this role—transaction processing, inventory management, and customer registration—are already being replaced by self-checkout kiosks and automated systems. Furthermore, the entire business model is being structurally superseded by digital streaming platforms (AI-driven recommendation engines), leading to a rapid decline in physical storefronts and the human labor required to run them.

title: フロント（ホテル・旅館）
exposure_rationale: Core administrative tasks like reservations, check-ins, and payments are increasingly automated through self-service kiosks and mobile apps, a trend accelerated by Japan's 2018 Hotel Business Act amendment. While high-end 'omotenashi' service requires human presence, AI-driven translation and concierge tools are significantly reducing the need for human staff to handle routine information processing and multilingual support.

title: ブライダルコーディネーター
exposure_rationale: AI can significantly automate the digital aspects of this role, such as generating creative themes, creating detailed cost estimates, and managing complex scheduling and vendor logistics. However, the core of the job remains deeply rooted in high-stakes emotional labor, physical venue management, and real-time crisis handling, which provides a buffer against full automation.

title: ベビーシッター
exposure_rationale: The core of babysitting involves physical care, safety management, and emotional interaction in unpredictable home environments, which AI cannot replicate. While AI might assist with peripheral tasks like reporting, scheduling, or providing educational activity suggestions, the fundamental requirement for human presence and trust-based childcare remains a significant barrier to automation.

title: ホテル・旅館支配人
exposure_rationale: While the core of the job involves physical facility management and high-touch hospitality (omotenashi), the role is increasingly data-driven regarding revenue management, inventory optimization, and personnel scheduling. AI will significantly automate the analytical and administrative aspects of hotel management, though the need for human leadership and crisis management in a physical environment remains essential.

title: ホールスタッフ（レストラン）
exposure_rationale: While AI and robotics are increasingly handling routine tasks like order-taking (via tablets/apps) and food delivery (via serving robots), the core of the role remains physical and interpersonal. In Japan's hospitality culture (Omotenashi), human presence is highly valued for handling complex customer needs, maintaining cleanliness, and managing unpredictable social interactions, which limits full automation.

title: マンション管理員
exposure_rationale: While AI and IoT can automate routine tasks like facility monitoring, parcel logging, and basic resident inquiries, the core of the job requires physical presence for site inspections, emergency response, and nuanced interpersonal mediation. In Japan's aging society, the 'human face' of the manager provides a sense of security and community oversight that is difficult to fully replace with digital systems.

title: メイクアップアーティスト
exposure_rationale: The core of the job requires physical application of cosmetics to human skin and real-time adjustments on set, which are tasks AI and robotics cannot currently replicate in unpredictable environments. While AI can assist in the 'digital' planning phase (generating mood boards or simulating looks), the high-touch nature and the requirement for a Japanese beautician license (美容師免許) provide significant protection against automation.

title: ラーメン調理人
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical labor, sensory judgment (taste/smell), and manual dexterity in a high-heat, unpredictable environment. While AI can optimize inventory management and automated noodle cookers exist, the artisanal nature of independent shops and the physical demands of cleaning and prep work limit total exposure.

title: リフレクソロジスト
exposure_rationale: Reflexology is a highly physical and tactile occupation requiring precise manual pressure and real-time human interaction in a physical environment. While AI may assist with administrative tasks or provide health advice, the core service—physical manipulation of the body for relaxation—cannot be replicated by digital AI, and robotic alternatives currently lack the necessary sensory feedback and cultural acceptance for high-touch hospitality.

title: レンタカー店舗スタッフ
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant amount of physical labor, such as vehicle cleaning, inspection, and moving cars, which are resistant to AI. However, the administrative and customer service components—booking management, contract explanations, and identity verification—are increasingly being automated through AI-driven self-service kiosks and mobile apps, reducing the need for human staff per location.

title: 中華料理調理人
exposure_rationale: The core tasks involve high-heat manual cooking, physical dexterity with heavy woks, and sensory judgment that are difficult to automate in a traditional kitchen setting. However, AI and robotics are increasingly handling prep work (automated vegetable cutters) and standardized cooking (fried rice robots), particularly in Japan's chain restaurants facing labor shortages.

title: 介護支援専門員/ケアマネジャー
exposure_rationale: Care managers perform heavy administrative and data-driven tasks, such as assessment analysis and care plan documentation, which are highly susceptible to AI automation and optimization. However, the role requires significant human-to-human interaction, ethical judgment, and physical home visits to monitor elderly clients, creating a baseline of human necessity that prevents full automation.

title: 児童発達支援管理責任者
児童相談所相談員
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly assist in analyzing case histories, drafting reports, and processing psychological test data, the core of the job involves high-stakes human interaction, home visits, and physical intervention in sensitive family environments. Japan's legal framework and the need for ethical accountability in child welfare ensure that final judgments and relationship-building remain human-centric tasks.

title: 医療ソーシャルワーカー
exposure_rationale: Medical social workers handle complex cases involving legal regulations, insurance systems, and administrative paperwork, all of which are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and information processing. However, the core of the role involves deep interpersonal trust, psychological counseling, and navigating sensitive family dynamics in physical healthcare settings, which provides a significant buffer against full replacement.

title: 客室乗務員
exposure_rationale: While AI can automate information-based tasks like safety briefings, duty-free sales, and entry document assistance, the core of the job involves physical safety management, emergency response, and high-touch hospitality. Japan's aging population and labor shortages may lead to more AI-driven service robots in cabins, but the regulatory requirement for human presence to manage evacuations and medical emergencies provides a strong floor against full automation.

title: 家政婦（夫）
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a housekeeper—cleaning, cooking, and providing physical care—require manual dexterity and navigation of unpredictable physical environments that current AI and robotics cannot easily replicate. While AI might assist with peripheral scheduling or meal planning, the fundamental labor remains physical and human-centric, especially in the context of Japan's aging population where interpersonal care is highly valued.

title: 接客担当（ホテル・旅館）
exposure_rationale: While AI can handle information-heavy tasks like concierge recommendations, language translation, and booking management, the core of the role involves physical labor (carrying luggage, serving meals) and high-touch 'Omotenashi' hospitality. Japan's cultural emphasis on human-centric service in ryokans and luxury hotels acts as a significant barrier to full automation, though labor shortages are driving AI adoption for peripheral administrative tasks.

title: 施設介護員
exposure_rationale: The core tasks involve physical assistance (bathing, feeding, mobility) and emotional support in unpredictable environments, which are highly resistant to AI. While AI and robotics can assist with monitoring, documentation, and lifting, the high demand for human-to-human care and Japan's cultural emphasis on 'omotenashi' in caregiving limit the potential for significant displacement.

title: 施設管理者（介護施設）
exposure_rationale: As a management role, AI will significantly streamline administrative tasks such as shift scheduling, compliance monitoring, and financial reporting, which are currently labor-intensive in Japan's care sector. However, the core of the job involves high-stakes human interaction, including staff leadership, family mediation, and community relations, which remain difficult to automate.

title: 日本料理調理人（板前）
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical manual dexterity, sensory judgment (taste/smell), and artistic presentation that are difficult to automate. While AI can optimize inventory, procurement, and menu planning, the high-end nature of 'Itamae' work emphasizes seasonal human intuition and hospitality which remains resistant to full displacement.

title: 洋菓子製造、パティシエ
exposure_rationale: While AI can assist in recipe generation, inventory management, and aesthetic design inspiration, the core of a pastry chef's work is highly physical, involving delicate manual dexterity and sensory judgment (taste and smell) that robots cannot yet replicate cost-effectively. In Japan's artisanal culture, the 'human touch' and craftsmanship of a patissier are highly valued, though factory-based production roles face higher risks of automation.

title: 理容師
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a barber—haircutting, shaving, and physical styling—require high manual dexterity and real-time physical interaction in an unpredictable environment that current robotics cannot replicate. While AI may assist with peripheral business tasks like appointment scheduling, customer records, or trend analysis, the primary service remains a hands-on physical labor protected by regulatory licensing and cultural preferences for human touch.

title: 福祉ソーシャルワーカー
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly automate documentation, case history analysis, and the matching of clients to complex government services, the core of the job involves high-stakes interpersonal empathy and physical site visits. Japan's regulatory environment and the need for human-to-human trust in sensitive social welfare cases act as a strong barrier to full automation.

title: 福祉事務所ケースワーカー
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly automate administrative tasks like report writing, eligibility calculations, and legal research, the core of the job requires physical home visits and high-stakes interpersonal judgment. In Japan's welfare system, the caseworker's role as a human coordinator and emotional support provider for vulnerable populations creates a strong barrier to full automation.

title: 福祉用具専門相談員
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly assist in matching specific physical conditions to the vast catalog of welfare equipment and automating the creation of utilization plans, the core of the job requires physical home visits to assess residential structures and perform manual adjustments of equipment. The role also involves high-touch interpersonal communication with elderly users and coordination with other healthcare professionals, which are resistant to full automation in Japan's care culture.

title: 納棺師
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves highly delicate physical manipulation of human remains and providing emotional support to grieving families, tasks that are difficult to automate. While AI may assist with administrative reporting or scheduling, the physical requirements and the cultural sensitivity required for 'last rites' in Japan create a strong barrier to AI replacement.

title: 給食調理員
exposure_rationale: The core tasks are physical and manual, involving large-scale cooking, cleaning, and equipment operation in a high-temperature environment. While AI can optimize menu planning, inventory management, and safety inspections (HACCP), the physical labor of food preparation and sanitation remains difficult to automate fully without expensive specialized robotics that are not yet standard in most Japanese school or hospital kitchens.

title: 美容師
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a beautician—cutting, coloring, and styling hair—require high-precision manual dexterity and physical interaction in an unpredictable environment that AI cannot currently replicate. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like appointment scheduling, customer record management, and AI-driven hairstyle simulations for consultations, the physical service remains a fundamental barrier to automation.

title: 老人福祉施設生活相談員
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly automate the heavy administrative burden of documentation, contract processing, and inter-agency coordination, the core of the role involves high-stakes interpersonal mediation and emotional support for elderly residents and their families. Japan's regulatory requirements and the need for physical presence in care facilities provide a buffer against full automation, though AI will likely become a mandatory tool for managing complex care plans and regional networking.

title: 葬祭ディレクター
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly streamline administrative tasks like scheduling, document preparation, and religious consultation logistics, the core of the role involves physical labor (transporting bodies, setting up venues) and high-touch emotional support for grieving families. Japan's cultural emphasis on ritual precision and human empathy in funeral services creates a strong barrier against full automation of the director's interpersonal and supervisory duties.

title: 西洋料理調理人（コック）
exposure_rationale: While the core tasks of cooking, plating, and sensory evaluation require physical dexterity and human judgment that AI cannot currently replicate, AI can significantly optimize peripheral tasks like inventory management, menu engineering based on food trends, and nutritional analysis. In Japan's labor-shortage economy, AI-driven kitchen automation and smart appliances may handle more prep work, but the high-end artistry and hospitality (Omotenashi) inherent in Western cuisine remain human-centric.

title: 訪問介護のサービス提供責任者
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly automate administrative tasks like care plan drafting, scheduling, and insurance billing, the core of the role involves high-stakes human coordination, physical site visits, and emotional labor. Japan's severe labor shortage in eldercare will drive AI adoption for efficiency, but the legal requirement for human oversight and the necessity of physical presence for home visits create a strong floor against full automation.

title: 訪問介護員/ホームヘルパー
exposure_rationale: The core tasks involve physical assistance (bathing, feeding, mobility) and emotional support in unpredictable home environments, which are extremely difficult for AI or robotics to replicate. While AI may assist with scheduling, reporting, and monitoring, the fundamental nature of the work remains hands-on and human-centric, especially given Japan's cultural emphasis on interpersonal care.

title: 調理補助
exposure_rationale: The core tasks involve physical labor in unpredictable environments, such as washing, cutting, and plating food, which are difficult to automate fully with current AI. While AI can optimize scheduling and inventory, and specialized robotics may eventually handle routine prep in large-scale facilities, the high demand for human labor in Japan's aging society and the need for manual dexterity keep exposure relatively low.

title: 通訳ガイド
exposure_rationale: While real-time translation and information retrieval are highly susceptible to AI, this role requires physical presence, logistical management (tour leader duties), and high-level interpersonal hospitality (omotenashi). AI will significantly augment the knowledge-sharing aspect and lower the barrier to entry, but the human-to-human connection and physical safety management remain essential in the Japanese tourism context.

title: 遊園地スタッフ
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical presence, safety monitoring, and real-time human interaction in a physical environment, which are resistant to AI. While AI can automate peripheral tasks like ticketing, digital signage, and predictive maintenance for rides, the essential roles of crowd control, emergency response, and hospitality remain human-centric.

title: 障害福祉サービス管理責任者
exposure_rationale: The role involves significant administrative and documentation tasks, such as creating 'Individual Support Plans' and monitoring progress, which are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and drafting assistance. However, the core of the job requires deep human empathy, complex interpersonal communication with non-verbal or distressed individuals, and physical presence in care settings, creating a strong barrier to full replacement.

title: 障害者グループホーム世話人
exposure_rationale: The core of this role involves physical assistance with daily living (cooking, cleaning, hygiene) and complex interpersonal mediation between residents in a group home setting. While AI can assist with peripheral administrative tasks like scheduling, medication logging, or meal planning, the high demand for physical presence, emotional empathy, and real-time response to unpredictable human behavior in a residential environment makes it highly resistant to automation.

title: 障害者福祉施設指導専門員（生活支援員、就労支援員等）
exposure_rationale: The core of this role involves high-touch human interaction, emotional empathy, and physical presence in unpredictable environments, which are resistant to AI. While AI can significantly streamline administrative tasks, case documentation, and job-matching analysis, the fundamental requirement for building trust and providing hands-on support to individuals with disabilities remains a human-centric task.

title: 飲食チェーン店店員
exposure_rationale: While core physical tasks like cleaning and food preparation remain difficult to fully automate, AI is rapidly taking over the information-heavy aspects of the job, such as order-taking (voice recognition), inventory management, and AI-driven shift scheduling. Japan's severe labor shortage is accelerating the adoption of self-service kiosks and robotic servers, reducing the total human headcount required per store.

title: 駐車場管理
exposure_rationale: The core tasks involve physical presence for vehicle guidance, facility cleaning, and manual equipment troubleshooting, which are resistant to AI. While AI and automation are increasingly handling payment processing and license plate recognition, the remaining human role is focused on physical security, safety monitoring, and assisting elderly or confused drivers in an unpredictable environment.

title: さく井工/ボーリング工
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: This occupation is primarily physical, involving the assembly of heavy machinery, site preparation, and manual labor in unpredictable outdoor environments. While AI and sensors can improve geological data analysis and drilling precision, the core tasks require physical presence, manual dexterity, and human teamwork that cannot be digitized or automated by AI in the near future.

title: クレーン運転士
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While crane operation involves physical machinery in unpredictable environments like construction sites and ports, AI and remote-control technologies are increasingly assisting with precision, safety monitoring, and automated path planning. However, the core requirement for real-time human judgment in high-stakes physical environments and the need for manual 'slings' (tamagake) tasks keep the exposure relatively low for the next decade.

title: タクシー運転手
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While autonomous driving technology poses a long-term existential threat to the core task of driving, Japan's current regulatory environment and the physical requirements of passenger assistance (luggage, elderly care, and emergency response) provide a significant buffer. AI is currently a high-impact tool for route optimization and demand forecasting (dispatch apps), but the transition to fully driverless taxis in complex urban Japanese environments remains a gradual process rather than an immediate replacement.

title: タンクローリー乗務員
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical handling of hazardous materials, manual hose connections, and strict safety inspections that require a human presence to prevent environmental disasters. While autonomous driving and AI-optimized routing will assist with the transit phase, the high-risk nature of loading/unloading chemicals and the legal requirement for human oversight in Japan limit full automation.

title: ダンプカー運転手
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While autonomous driving technology is already being deployed in controlled environments like mines and large-scale construction sites, navigating unpredictable public roads and complex construction zones remains a significant barrier. Japan's severe driver shortage will accelerate the adoption of AI-assisted safety and routing features, but the physical nature of the work and the need for real-time human judgment in diverse environments keep the core role intact for now.

title: トラックドライバー
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While AI and autonomous driving technology are advancing, the core job involves complex physical tasks like manual loading/unloading (荷役), navigating unpredictable urban environments, and final-mile delivery that require human presence. Japan's regulatory environment and the '2024 Problem' labor shortage prioritize AI for peripheral tasks like route optimization and administrative logging rather than full automation of the driving and handling roles in the near term.

title: トレーラートラックドライバー
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While autonomous driving technology is advancing, trailer driving involves complex maneuvering in unpredictable physical environments and specialized cargo handling that remains difficult to automate fully. In Japan, AI currently serves as a supportive tool for route optimization and safety monitoring, but regulatory hurdles and the physical nature of the work protect the core role from near-term replacement.

title: ドローンパイロット
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The core task of manual piloting is rapidly being replaced by AI-driven autonomous flight, obstacle avoidance, and pre-programmed pathing. While physical deployment and regulatory oversight remain, the 'pilot' role is shifting toward data management and system supervision, with AI increasingly handling the complex flight maneuvers and real-time data analysis.

title: パイロット
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: Commercial aviation is already highly automated, but AI will further enhance flight path optimization, fuel efficiency, and real-time monitoring of complex systems. While technical barriers to fully autonomous passenger flights are decreasing, Japan's strict safety regulations and the legal/moral necessity for human accountability in emergencies ensure that pilots remain essential for the foreseeable future, even as their role shifts more toward systems management.

title: ビル施設管理
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While AI and IoT sensors are increasingly automating the monitoring of power, HVAC, and water systems, the core job still requires physical presence for manual repairs, equipment inspections, and responding to on-site tenant complaints. Japan's aging infrastructure and labor shortage will drive AI adoption for predictive maintenance, but the hands-on technical troubleshooting remains difficult to automate fully.

title: フォークリフト運転作業員
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While automated guided vehicles (AGVs) and autonomous forklifts are increasingly common in modern Japanese warehouses, a significant portion of the work involves non-routine tasks, irregular cargo shapes, and complex spatial navigation that still requires human judgment. Japan's labor shortage is accelerating automation in this sector, but the physical nature of the environment and the need for real-time problem solving provide a buffer against total AI replacement in the near term.

title: フードデリバリー（料理配達員）
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業

title: ボイラーオペレーター
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of monitoring gauges, adjusting combustion, and recording data are highly susceptible to AI-driven predictive maintenance and automated control systems. However, the role still requires physical inspections, manual emergency shutdowns, and on-site equipment repairs, which provide a buffer against full automation.

title: ルート配送ドライバー
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While autonomous driving and AI route optimization will significantly impact the driving portion of the job, the core role involves heavy physical labor, such as loading/unloading containers and navigating unpredictable delivery environments. In Japan's aging society, AI will likely serve as a supportive tool to mitigate labor shortages rather than replace the human driver, who is still required for manual handling and interpersonal communication at delivery sites.

title: 介護タクシー運転手
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The core of this job involves physical assistance (lifting, transferring patients) and navigating unpredictable real-world environments, which are highly resistant to AI. While AI can optimize scheduling and route planning, the essential human-to-human care and physical labor required for elderly and disabled passengers cannot be automated in the next decade.

title: 宅配便配達員
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical labor, navigating unpredictable real-world environments, and face-to-face customer interaction, which are resistant to AI. However, AI significantly optimizes peripheral tasks like route planning, load balancing, and automated customer communication for re-delivery, increasing individual productivity in response to Japan's severe labor shortage.

title: 建設機械オペレーター
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While the core work is physical and takes place in unpredictable outdoor environments, this field is a primary target for 'i-Construction' initiatives in Japan. AI-driven automated driving and remote-control systems for heavy machinery are already being deployed to combat severe labor shortages, though human oversight and complex site-specific judgment remain essential.

title: 新聞配達員
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The core task is physical delivery in unpredictable outdoor environments, which is highly resistant to AI automation and currently difficult for robots to navigate (stairs, narrow gates, specific drop-off points). While AI might optimize delivery routes or manage digital subscriptions, the physical labor remains essential, though the overall demand for the role is declining due to the digitalization of the news medium itself.

title: 清涼飲料ルートセールス
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The core of this job involves heavy physical labor, manual driving, and the physical maintenance of vending machines, which are resistant to digital AI automation. While AI will significantly optimize route planning, inventory forecasting, and sales analysis, the physical requirement to load, transport, and stock heavy products in unpredictable real-world environments remains a major barrier to full automation.

title: 産業廃棄物収集運搬作業員
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: This occupation is primarily physical, requiring manual sorting, heavy lifting, and the operation of specialized machinery in unpredictable environments like construction sites and hospitals. While AI and autonomous driving may eventually assist with route optimization or long-haul transport, the core tasks of physical collection and handling hazardous materials remain highly resistant to automation in the near term.

title: 発電所運転管理
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The core monitoring and output adjustment tasks are highly digital and data-driven, making them prime candidates for AI optimization and predictive maintenance. However, the role requires significant physical presence for equipment patrols, manual inspections, and emergency response in high-stakes environments, which limits full automation in the near term.

title: 航海士
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of navigation, route planning, and monitoring are increasingly data-driven and susceptible to AI-powered autonomous shipping technologies, which Japan is actively developing to combat labor shortages. However, the role still requires significant physical oversight, emergency response, and leadership of a multicultural crew, providing a buffer against full automation in the near term.

title: 船舶機関士
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While AI and automation are increasingly used for remote monitoring and predictive maintenance of ship engines, the role requires significant physical labor, manual repairs, and emergency response in a harsh, unpredictable maritime environment. Japan's focus on autonomous shipping may reduce crew sizes, but the need for on-site human engineers to perform physical interventions and manage complex mechanical systems remains essential.

title: 観光バスガイド
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While AI can automate the information-delivery and multilingual translation aspects of sightseeing, the role requires significant physical presence for passenger safety, vehicle guidance, and real-time atmosphere management. Japan's labor shortage may drive the use of AI avatars for routine explanations, but the human-centric hospitality (omotenashi) and physical coordination with the driver remain core barriers to full automation.

title: 観光バス運転士
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While autonomous driving technology (Level 4/5) targets this sector, the physical complexity of navigating unpredictable tourist locations and the high safety responsibility for human lives create significant barriers. AI currently assists with peripheral tasks like route optimization and digital tachograph management, but the core job remains a physical, high-stakes human service in a non-digital environment.

title: 路線バス運転士
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While autonomous driving technology (Level 4) is being trialed in specific Japanese zones to combat driver shortages, the core job remains highly physical and requires real-time human intervention for passenger safety, boarding assistance for the elderly, and navigating unpredictable urban traffic. AI currently serves as a supportive tool for scheduling and fuel efficiency, but full replacement is hindered by complex infrastructure and the high level of interpersonal responsibility required in public transit.

title: 送迎バス等運転手
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The core task is physical driving and passenger assistance in real-world environments, which is resistant to pure AI software. While autonomous driving technology (Level 4) is being trialed for fixed-route shuttles in Japan to combat labor shortages, full replacement is hindered by the need for human-to-human care, such as assisting elderly or disabled passengers and managing unpredictable boarding scenarios.

title: 鉄道車掌
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: Many core tasks like ticket checking, route announcements, and door operation are being automated through IC cards, AI-driven digital signage, and ATO (Automatic Train Operation) systems. While safety oversight and emergency response still require a human presence, Japan's labor shortage and the rise of 'one-man' (driver-only) operations are rapidly reducing the need for dedicated conductors on many lines.

title: 電車運転士
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: Train operation is highly susceptible to AI because it follows fixed routes and is already supported by automated systems like ATC and ATO. While Japan's complex urban networks and safety protocols currently require human oversight for emergencies and passenger safety, the government and major rail operators (like JR East) are actively transitioning toward GoA3/GoA4 (driverless) operations to combat labor shortages.
